name: io.github.Happygallo/apple-ads
description: Manage Apple Search Ads campaigns, keywords, budgets, and reports via API v5.

environmentVariables.name: ASA_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Apple Search Ads client ID (starts with SEARCHADS.)

environmentVariables.name: ASA_TEAM_ID
environmentVariables.description: Apple Search Ads team ID (starts with SEARCHADS.)

environmentVariables.name: ASA_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to your PKCS#8 private key file

environmentVariables.name: ASA_ORG_ID
environmentVariables.description: Organization ID (optional, use list_organizations to switch at runtime)
